_comment: Cowork bridge sample. Claude for Desktop's Cowork is local-only with no API, so it writes this file into a connected folder and GoldenSyrup OS reads it. Replace with live task state; shape: { generatedAt, tasks: [{ id, title, category, status, progress, detail, updated }] }. status ∈ live|progress|blocked|idle.
